subject: Enhancing Client Communication at Varghese Summersett
body: I've observed that clients often express concerns about communication gaps in reviews for criminal defense firms. This can impact client retention and satisfaction. Clarion offers a solution by turning client feedback into structured governance insights. Our weekly governance brief reveals these communication patterns and suggests actionable steps for your leadership team. If you're open to it, I can walk through what that would look like using a sample of your firm's public reviews.
